across.clue: To boost something means to increase or improve it.
A nerve is a bundle of fibers that carries messages between the brain and other parts of the body.
A period of time usually a short one.
A passage is a narrow space that people can move through.
A chorus is a group of singers who sing together.
A commentator is a person who gives opinions or describes something, often on TV or the radio.
To evaporate means to change from liquid into gas.
To arrest someone means to catch that person for doing something bad.
A guideline is a rule about how to do something.
To shake is to move back and forth or up and down quickly.

down.clue: Following your command, instruction, or request; because you ordered or asked for it | at your ___
A leash is a rope or chain that is used to lead an animal.
When you are in pursuit of something, you are chasing it.
a note at the bottom of a page that gives more detailed information about something on the page.
Magnetic means having the properties of a magnet.
not made correctly or not working correctly
An opportunity is a chance to do something.
Anxious means feeling worried or nervous.
An alarm is something that warns people of danger.
A fierce person or animal is angry or violent.
